new_classes.label_en: Blended grain Scotch whisky or single grain Scotch whisky in containers > 2 L (subheading 2208 30 69)
new_classes.label_de: Blended-Grain-Scotch-Whisky oder Single-Grain-Scotch-Whisky in Behältnissen mit einem Inhalt von mehr als 2 Litern (Unterposition 2208 30 69)
new_classes.definition_en: Single grain Scotch whisky (a spirit other than single malt or blended malt Scotch whisky, produced at a single distillery by distilling a fermented mash of malted barley with or without whole grains of other cereals) and blended grain Scotch whisky, both presented in containers holding more than 2 litres, classified under CN subheading 2208 30 69.

new_classes.label_en: Single grain Scotch whisky distillation process (fermented mash of malted barley with or without whole grains of other cereals, at a single distillery)
new_classes.label_de: Destillationsprozess für Single-Grain-Scotch-Whisky (vergorene Maische aus gemälzter Gerste mit oder ohne ganzen Körnern anderer Getreidearten, in einer einzelnen Brennerei)
new_classes.definition_en: Distillation process carried out at a single distillery, starting from a fermented mash of malted barley with or without whole grains of other cereals, yielding a spirit that is neither single malt Scotch whisky nor blended malt Scotch whisky.

new_classes.label_en: Single grain composition quality (grain spirit from a single distillery, not single malt and not blended malt)
new_classes.label_de: Single-Grain-Qualität (Kornbrand aus einer einzelnen Brennerei, weder Single Malt noch Blended Malt)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a Scotch whisky spirit indicating that it was produced at a single distillery from a fermented mash of malted barley with or without whole grains of other cereals, and that it is neither a single malt Scotch whisky nor a blended malt Scotch whisky.

new_classes.label_en: Blended grain composition quality (blend of two or more single grain whiskies from different distilleries)
new_classes.label_de: Blended-Grain-Qualität (Mischung aus zwei oder mehr Single-Grain-Whiskys aus verschiedenen Brennereien)
new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a Scotch whisky spirit indicating that it is a blend of two or more single grain Scotch whiskies produced at different distilleries.

coverage_explanation: The proposed axioms cover the main distinguishing criteria for CN 2208 30 69: (1) the product is a Scotch whisky (ScotchWhiskyOriginQuality), (2) it is a single grain or blended grain type (SingleGrainCompositionQuality / BlendedGrainCompositionQuality), (3) it is in containers > 2 L (LargeContainer), (4) it is produced by a single-grain distillation process (SingleGrainScotchWhiskyDistillationProcess), (5) it is neither a single malt nor a blended malt whisky (complement restrictions), and (6) soda water has not been added (distinguishing it from 2208 30 61). Coverage is slightly below 1.0 because the exact grain mash composition criterion (malted barley ± whole grains of other cereals, predominantly unmalted grains in practice) is described in a textual definition but cannot be fully formalised without additional ingredient classes for unmalted cereals. The blended grain variant (blend of single grain whiskies from different distilleries) is captured via BlendedGrainCompositionQuality but the container-size split between 2208 30 61 (≤ 2 L) and 2208 30 69 (> 2 L) is encoded via LargeContainer. The sibling class ScotchWhiskyWithSodaWater22083061 covers the ≤ 2 L range with soda water; a pure grain whisky in ≤ 2 L containers falls under 2208 30 61 and is excluded here by the LargeContainer restriction.
